title: Homeshopa Bath Sponge for Adults, 6 Pack Exfoliating Body Shower Scrubber for Men Women Kids Children, Double-Sided Body Massage Sponges with 3 Colors, Cleaning Exfoliating Bathing Accessories
features: REFRESHED, SMOOTH, CLEAN SKIN: Looking for something kinder? Using our bath sponge, create a luxurious, creamy lather while exfoliating your body. When used as part of your daily routine, these exfoliating body sponges are intended to provide a genuinely thorough cleaning and leave skin feeling smoother and softer. Your bathing experience will be improved by using this bathing sponge, which will also make your skin feel brand-new.

INTELLIGENT DESIGN: Our shower sponges are simple, yet effective; the sublimely soft sponge whips up a rich lather and pampers the skin, while the dimpled scrub surface is tough but gentle, exfoliating the pores and lifting unwanted dirt and oils with ease, leaving your skin feeling deeply cleansed.

RESPONSIBLE AND DURABLE: Our exfoliating sponges are built to last; simply rinse and air dry after each use to get the most out of them day after day after day. When exposed to water, it softens quickly and hardens after air-drying, making it ideal for storage and preservation. We're confident you'll be glowing in no time!

REVIVE YOUR SKIN: Everyone deserves to feel confident in their skin because it is clear, clean, healthy, and glowing. That is why we created our body shower scrubber for people of all skin types, genders, and ages. If you have sensitive skin, you can use our sponge without worry. Have a slightly oilier complexion. This is the bath sponge for you. Gentle and pure for children or babies.

QUALITY, LUXURY AND VALUE: Homeshopa dual-action massage sponges are made of 100% natural ingredients, making them an ideal shower scrub that makes bathing fun. This package contains three soft bath foam sponges in three different colours. You can use the body cleaning sponges for a variety of purposes, including removing dirt from the body, exfoliating, and sharing with family and friends.
